summary: Verified both bug fixes for Alfa Global Group website: 1) Live market ticker now shows real data from NSE/Google Finance/exchange rate APIs, 2) Latest Research links now navigate to /insights page correctly. All tests passed.

issues: Maritime Industry Report image not loading (shows alt text instead of image)

action_items: Minor: Fix Maritime Industry Report image URL on Insights page (currently shows broken image)
critical_code_review_comments: Market data API properly implements caching (5 min TTL) to avoid rate limiting
Fallback values are provided for all market indices if live fetch fails
Research cards correctly wrapped in Link components pointing to /insights
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported bugs (live market ticker and research links) have been fixed and verified. Market data API returns realistic values for SENSEX (~78,400), NIFTY 50 (~24,300), USD/INR (~93.44), Gold and Silver. Research cards on homepage navigate to /insights page. Minor issue: Maritime Industry Report image on Insights page is broken.

bug_1_live_market_ticker.description: Live market ticker at bottom of hero section showing real data

details.api_endpoint: /api/market-data returns success:true with all required keys

bug_2_latest_research_links.description: 3 research cards on homepage should be clickable and navigate to /insights

bug_3_insights_page.description: Insights page should show 6 research cards with hero section and CTA
